svg.text: Claude Code CLI — production DevOps integration points

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me Claude Code CLI git hook examples for pre-commit and pre-push')
sendPrompt('Show me a GitHub Actions workflow YAML that runs Claude security and quality checks on every PR')
sendPrompt('Show me Claude CLI commands for analyzing test failures and auto-fixing flaky tests in CI')
sendPrompt('Show me how to use Claude CLI to review Terraform plans and Kubernetes manifests before deployment')
sendPrompt('Show me a Claude-powered production incident response runbook automation script')
sendPrompt('Show me Claude CLI commands for analyzing cloud costs and suggesting rightsizing recommendations')
sendPrompt('Show me how to pipe observability data like logs and metrics into Claude for anomaly detection')
sendPrompt('Show me Claude CLI commands for generating runbooks and postmortems from incident data')
sendPrompt('What are the best practices for storing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY securely in GitHub Actions and other CI systems?')
g.text: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in secrets vault | model routing per task | cost telemetry | rate limit budget
